mapper.select: SELECT message_idx, chatroom_idx, sender_idx, message_content, sent_at, is_read, read_at FROM chatmessage WHERE chatroom_idx = #{chatroomIdx} ORDER BY sent_at ASC, message_idx ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chatmessage ( chatroom_idx, sender_idx, message_content, sent_at, is_read, read_at ) VALUES ( #{chatroomIdx}, #{senderIdx}, #{messageContent}, NOW(), 'N', NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chatmessage cm INNER JOIN chatroom cr ON cr.chatroom_idx = cm.chatroom_idx WHERE (cr.buyer_idx = #{memIdx} OR cr.bidder_idx = #{memIdx}) AND cm.sender_idx != #{memIdx} AND cm.is_read = 'N'
